messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"# Check the key sections of the output\\npython3 -c \\\"\\nimport json\\nwith open('/tmp/archit-test-data.json') as f:\\n    data = json.load(f)\\n\\nprint('=== BOTTOM LINE ===')\\nprint(data.get('verdict_summary', 'MISSING'))\\nprint()\\n\\nprint('=== TRADEOFFS (Priority Alignment) ===')\\nfor t in data.get('tradeoffs', []):\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"- {t.get('need', '?')}: {t.get('verdict', '?')}\\\\\\\")\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"  Evidence: {t.get('evidence', '?')[:80]}...\\\\\\\")\\nprint()\\n\\nprint('=== BEHAVIORAL EVIDENCE ===')\\nfor b in data.get('behavioral_evidence', []):\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"- {b.get('signal', '?')}\\\\\\\")\\n    if b.get('quote'):\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"  Quote: {b.get('quote', '')[:80]}...\\\\\\\")\\nprint()\\n\\nprint('=== CULTURE MATCH ===')\\nfor c in data.get('culture_match', []):\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"- {c.get('name', '?')}\\\\\\\")\\n\\\"\\n\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01YKSzvM2rZuQjRgqvLk54q7","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":64684,"cache_write_tokens":342,"cache_read_tokens":64341,"output_tokens":347,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":342,"cache_read_input_tokens":64341,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":347}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T17:33:55.430444Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_016xHFuHXV2R58GQg3tp3mMf","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"5974177d-1cac-4a24-bdd6-338c31a6a19c","metadata":null}
